case_title: RODNEY HAMPTON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. (OTIS)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. (OTIS)
ORDER CONTIUED TO DEC. 13, 2016 AT 1:30. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO MATTER BEING HEARD BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF TO COMPLETE PROCESS OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HAMPTON, RODNEY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. (OTIS) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMPTON, RODNEY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMPTON, RODNEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. (OTIS) DEFENDANT ESTABLISHED THAT THE CORRECTIVE ACTION IT TOOK TO PROTECT AGAINST THE RISK OF INJURY CREATED BY THE BROKEN CONCRETE UTILITY COVER WAS REASONABLE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
